input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.4
            TITLE: flags

            CONTENT:
            rule D.4: FLAGS
D.4 FLAGS 
Any specific variations will be addressed at the drivers meeting.

final_answer: rule D.4: FLAGS D.4 FLAGS Any specific variations will be addressed at the drivers meeting.
